name: Diploma in Architecture
description: The D.Arch course equips students with essential knowledge and skills for designing simple structures, understanding construction methods, materials, and technical drawings.
eligibility: S.S.C or its equivalent with at least 35% aggregate marks.
vision: To be the most sought after academic, research and practice based school of Architecture that others would wish to emulate.

labs.name: Design Studio
labs.description: Equipped with standard drawing desks, parallel rulers, and drafting boards for basic architectural graphics.

labs.name: Material Museum
labs.description: A curated collection of basic building materials, brick types, timber joints, and masonry displays.

labs.name: Computer Lab
labs.description: Computers loaded with AutoCAD and fundamental modeling software for initial computer design practice.

labs.name: Model Making Workshop
labs.description: Equipped with cutters and manual tools for scale model assembly and prototyping.

faculty: Same as B.Arch faculty (shared teaching staff).

alumni_testimonial.name: Khot Sharabil Simab
alumni_testimonial.quote: My five years at AIKTC laid the strongest foundation for who I am today as an architect. It was a place that turned ideas into real skills and dreams into direction.
